rows.label: tev056901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev056901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Ngogo about the Nopon who have come to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev056901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Ngogo if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Ngogo if the Nopon will fight.

rows.label: tev056901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Ngogo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056901_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Ngogo about recent developments.

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Mira get really dangerous
once nasty Bias show up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lots of Nopon get eaten, in fact. So
elder and Ngogo come to city where
friends of Tatsu can protect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0003
rows.name:
As for other Nopon, maybe some come
just out of curiousness? City is
full of many wonders, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Maybe others hoping to sell information about
Mira to ignorant human friends and earn quick
buck. Nopon never miss chance to make moolah![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, Ngogo will give friends info
for free so long as they agree to
keep elder and Ngogo safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Elder Nan is very important leader
who oversees all Nopon caravans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0011
rows.name: ...Or at least, Elder Nan USED to be.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0012
rows.name:
But other Nopon fall out of love
with elder who complain too much
and never think things through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Pretty soon Nopon stop
listening to elder altogether.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0014
rows.name:
Now elder claims he about to give up ghost.
Such drama! But Nan still my elder.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ngogo considering putting secret plan
into action to cheer elder up. BLADE
friend should come help when plan is ready.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1001
rows.name:
Mo-mo-meeeeh! Never! No way!
Not happening! Too dangerous![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1002
rows.name:
Sure, some brave Nopon think they are
real bruisers, but most just hire
bodyguard to do fighting instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1003
rows.name:
After all, Nopon with battle injury cannot
sell as much, and selling is living![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1004
rows.name:
This is why Nopon like Ngogo and elder
make smart choice and come live in city
where human friends can protect them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1009
rows.name:
Elder Nan keep threatening to
teach Potepote all there is to
know about leading Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1010
rows.name:
But what does Elder Nan know
about LEADING these days? Ngogo
sense major impending disaster.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1011
rows.name:
Maybe Ngogo needs to quietly step
in and nudge Potepote in slightly
more responsible direction...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG1012
rows.name:
Ngogo knows better than to let successor
of elder turn into big whiny wimp![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG2001
rows.name:
Elder Nan still likes to play field, even though
old. Lately, not even alien girls are safe from
unwelcome and creepy advances of elder![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG2002
rows.name:
Now everyone look at Ngogo
like some kind of pervy
accomplice. Mo! So embarrassing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG2003
rows.name:
One would hope scathing lecture
from Pissa finally made Elder
Nan see error of ways.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG2004
rows.name:
*sigh* Maybe time is right for
Ngogo to quit job and start new
life in city like Pissa...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG3001
rows.name:
Did friend have any luck making
traditional Nopon royal cuisine?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG3002
rows.name:
No problem if friend want to
skip ridiculously annoying
steps. It still counts in end![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev056901_MSG3003
rows.name:
Anyway, Ngogo is looking forward to
what friend comes up with. Good luck![ST:wait ]
